name: PER_ALLOCATED_TASKS_
description: This table records the tasks within an allocated checklist to a person. These may be copied from templates in PER_TASKS_IN_CHECKLIST, but it is possible to override with values specific to the particular allocation.

columns.Name: ALLOCATED_TASK_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: SURVEY_RESPONSE_ID
columns.Comments: SURVEY_RESPONSE_ID

columns.Name: REMINDER_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Alert template for reminder.

columns.Name: STAGE_ALLOCATED_CHECKLIST_ID
columns.Comments: STAGE_ALLOCATED_CHECKLIST_ID

columns.Name: PROCESSING_MODE
columns.Comments: Identifies if the task need to be processed with SOA/ESS.

columns.Name: NEXT_REMINDER_DATE
columns.Comments: Identifies the date on which the next reminder for this task need to be sent.

columns.Name: REMINDER_COUNT
columns.Comments: Number of reminders sent.

columns.Name: DOCUMENTS_OF_RECORD_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HR_DOCUMENTS_OF_RECORD.DOCUMENTS_OF_RECORD_ID. Stores the reference of the document of record

columns.Name: SIGNER_ADDRESS
columns.Comments: Stores the Internet Protocol Address of the signer

columns.Name: TASK_IN_CHECKLIST_ID
columns.Comments: Corresponding Checklist Template Task Id.

columns.Name: RESP_PERFORMER_AVAILABILITY
columns.Comments: Indicates performer availability of selected performer type.

columns.Name: DEFAULT_PERF_RESP_TYPE
columns.Comments: Indicates the Performer type of the defaulted person.

columns.Name: ALLOCATED_CHECKLIST_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the allocated checklist to which the task belongs

columns.Name: TASK_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of the Allocated Task

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Description of the Allocated Task

columns.Name: MANDATORY_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the task is mandatory to be completed

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments:
The status of the task. System Lookup: PER_CHECKLIST_TASK_STATUS
Values -
COM - Completed
INI - Initiated
INP - In Progress
OUT - Outstanding
REJ - Rejected
SUS - Suspended
WIT - Withdrawn
WAI - Deferred to date
DEP - Dependent of other tasks to be completed.

columns.Name: PERFORMER_ORIG_SYSTEM
columns.Comments: Username for the Performer of the task

columns.Name: PERFORMER_ORIG_SYS_ID
columns.Comments: Person Id for the Performer of the task

columns.Name: RESPONSIBILITY_TYPE
columns.Comments: Denotes the Responsibility Type this Task has to be performed by.

columns.Name: RESPONSIBILITY_TYPE_GUID
columns.Comments: The Global User Ids of the  Responsible Persons this Task has to be performed by.

columns.Name: TASK_OWNER_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: PersonId for the Owner of the task

columns.Name: TASK_OWNER_USERNAME
columns.Comments: User name for the owner of the task

columns.Name: TASK_PERFORMERS
columns.Comments: Stores guid of all performers

columns.Name: TASK_OWNERS
columns.Comments: Stores guid of all owners

columns.Name: TASK_SEQUENCE
columns.Comments: Obsolete.

columns.Name: TASK_PERCENTAGE_COMPLETE
columns.Comments: Completion Percentage of the Allocated Task

columns.Name: TARGET_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Target Start Date for the task

columns.Name: TARGET_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Target End Date for the task

columns.Name: ACTUAL_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Actual Start Date for the task

columns.Name: ACTUAL_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Actual End Date for the task

columns.Name: ACTION_URL
columns.Comments: This is a drill down URL for this task

columns.Name: TASK_COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Comments by the Task Performer about this Task

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: ACTION_TYPE
columns.Comments:
System Lookup: ORA_CHK_TASK_ACTION_TYPES
Values: ORA_NONE - None
ORA_EXTERNAL_URL - External URL
ORA_APP_PROCESS - Application Task
ORA_DOC_RECORD - Document of Record
ORA_CUSTOM_FORM - Custom Form

columns.Name: TASK_CONFIGURATION
columns.Comments: Task Configuration

columns.Name: TASK_ACTION_ID
columns.Comments:
Foreign Key to PER_TASK_ACTIONS_B.TASK_ACTION_ID
Task Definition to use when Action Type = Application Task

columns.Name: ATTACHMENT_DOCUMENT_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Stores Document type for attachment

columns.Name: ATT_DOCUMENTS_OF_RECORD_ID
columns.Comments: Stores Document of record Id

columns.Name: DOCUMENT_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Document Type associated with this task when Action Type = Document of Record

columns.Name: FLEX_CONTEXT_CODE
columns.Comments: Flexfield Context Code when the Action Type = Custom Form

columns.Name: DEF_ALLOCATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Deferred Allocation Date

columns.Name: DEPENDENT_ON_TASKS
columns.Comments: Comma seperated list of all ALLOCATED_TASK_IDs based on which the current task will be unblocked.

columns.Name: ACTIVATION_ELIGY_PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: ACTIVATION_ELIGY_PRFL_ID

columns.Name: REMINDER_RECURRENCE
columns.Comments: Reminder recurrence (NEVER, EVERY, 1 .. 10). Default NEVER

columns.Name: REMINDER_DURATION
columns.Comments: Reminder duration P<Num Days>D

columns.Name: REMINDER_RELATIVE_TO
columns.Comments: Reminder relative to ASSIGNED or DUE

columns.Name: GENERATE_ATOM_FEED
columns.Comments: Identifies if ATOM feed needs to be generated

columns.Name: TARGET_DURATION
columns.Comments: Task expiration duration

columns.Name: TARGET_DURATION_UOM
columns.Comments:
System Lookup: CHECKLIST_QUALIFYING_UNITS
Values: D - Days
W - Weeks
M - Months
Task expiration duration unit of measure.

columns.Name: TASK_DELAY_DURATION
columns.Comments: TASK_DELAY_DURATION

columns.Name: TASK_DELAY_DURATION_UOM
columns.Comments: Task extension duration

columns.Name: MEETING_OFFSET
columns.Comments: Meeting Offset from Action Date

columns.Name: MEETING_TIME
columns.Comments: Meeting Time

columns.Name: EXPIRY_DAYS
columns.Comments: Expiry Days

columns.Name: CONTACT_DETAILS
columns.Comments: CONTACT_DETAILS

columns.Name: DETAIL_CHECKLIST_ID
columns.Comments: DETAIL_CHECKLIST_ID

columns.Name: DETAIL_ALLOC_CHECKLIST_ID
columns.Comments: DETAIL_ALLOC_CHECKLIST_ID

columns.Name: OWNER_RESP_TYPE
columns.Comments: OWNER_RESP_TYPE

columns.Name: OWNER_RESP_TYPE_USERS
columns.Comments: OWNER_RESP_TYPE_USERS

columns.Name: ABS_ALLOCATED_CHECKLIST_ID
columns.Comments: ABS_ALLOCATED_CHECKLIST_ID

columns.Name: TASK_ACTION_CODE
columns.Comments: Contains the action code associated with the task.

columns.Name: SIGN_TEMPLATE
columns.Comments: Stores the e-signature template details for action type = ORA_CHK_ESIGN

columns.Name: SIGN_DOCUMENT
columns.Comments: Stores the e-signature document details for action type = ORA_CHK_ESIGN

columns.Name: COMPLETED_BY
columns.Comments: User name of the user who completed the task

columns.Name: COMPLETION_DATE
columns.Comments: The date on which the task is completed.

columns.Name: ESIGN_TYPE
columns.Comments: Specifies Esignature Type

columns.Name: SIGN_DATE
columns.Comments: Specifies Sign Date

columns.Name: SIGNER_NAME
columns.Comments: Specifies Signer Name

columns.Name: SIGNER_EMAIL
columns.Comments: Specifies Email Id of Signer

columns.Name: DOCUMENT_ENTITY_ID
columns.Comments: Specifies Document Entity Id

columns.Name: REOPEN_DATE
columns.Comments: Specifies Task Reopen Date

columns.Name: REOPENED_BY
columns.Comments: Specifies Name of the Person Who reopened task

columns.Name: REPORT_PATH
columns.Comments: It contains the BI Publisher report folder path followed by the report name concatenated with a / symbol with optionally a list of parameters in the format of  parameter_name is equals to parameter value . The first parameter is prefixed with ? and & to denote each additional parameter

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the Questionnaire Identifier for the Questionnaire associated with this task

columns.Name: ERROR_DETAILS
columns.Comments: Details of any integration errors

columns.Name: LEARNING_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: LEARNING_ITEM_ID

columns.Name: LEARN_CONTENT_TYPE
columns.Comments: LEARN_CONTENT_TYPE

columns.Name: REPORT_PARAMETERS
columns.Comments: REPORT_PARAMETERS

columns.Comments: EXPIRY_DATE

columns.Name: TASK_FEATURE_DETAILS

columns.Name: TASK_INITIATOR_PERSON_ID

columns.Name: COMBINED_NOTIFICATION_ID
